name: auto-refresh: weekly/monthly sources are not refreshed by the daily auto-refresh script (different cadence)
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch && echo "2026-05-11T00:00:00Z" > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-last-fetch/weekly-source.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/auto-refresh-daily.sh" --now 2026-05-13T08:00:00Z --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" --report 2>out.txt && ! grep "weekly-source refreshed" out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
